mapper.select: SELECT * FROM SYNC_TASK WHERE STATUS = 1 ORDER BY CREATE_TIME DESC

SELECT * FROM SYNC_TASK WHERE RUN_STATUS IN
#{s}
SELECT * FROM SYNC_TASK WHERE SCHEDULE_ID = #{scheduleId} AND STATUS = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SYNC_TASK WHERE SCHEDULE_ID = #{scheduleId} AND STATUS = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SYNC_TASK WHERE SCHEDULE_ID = #{scheduleId} AND STATUS = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SYNC_TASK(ID, NAME, SOURCE_CONN_ID, TARGET_CONN_ID, SOURCE_TABLE, SOURCE_SQL, TARGET_TABLE, FIELD_MAPPING, CUSTOM_PK, MARKER_FIELD, LAST_MARKER_VALUE, PRIMARY_KEYS, SOURCE_WHERE, STRATEGY, FETCH_MODE, SYNC_MODE, BATCH_SIZE, TASK_GROUP, SCHEDULE_ID, RUN_STATUS, LAST_RUN_TIME, NEXT_RUN_TIME, TOTAL_ROWS_SYNCED, NO_UPDATE, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_TIME) VALUES(#{id}, #{name}, #{sourceConnId}, #{targetConnId}, #{sourceTable}, #{sourceSql,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{targetTable}, #{fieldMapping,jdbcType=CLOB}, #{customPk}, #{markerField}, #{lastMarkerValue}, #{primaryKeys}, #{sourceWhere}, #{strategy}, #{fetchMode}, #{syncMode}, #{batchSize}, #{taskGroup}, #{scheduleId}, #{runStatus}, #{lastRunTime}, #{nextRunTime}, #{totalRowsSynced}, #{noUpdate}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE SYNC_TASK SET NAME=#{name}, SOURCE_CONN_ID=#{sourceConnId}, TARGET_CONN_ID=#{targetConnId}, SOURCE_TABLE=#{sourceTable}, SOURCE_SQL=#{sourceSql,jdbcType=CLOB}, TARGET_TABLE=#{targetTable}, FIELD_MAPPING=#{fieldMapping,jdbcType=CLOB}, CUSTOM_PK=#{customPk}, MARKER_FIELD=#{markerField}, LAST_MARKER_VALUE=#{lastMarkerValue}, PRIMARY_KEYS=#{primaryKeys}, SOURCE_WHERE=#{sourceWhere}, STRATEGY=#{strategy}, FETCH_MODE=#{fetchMode}, SYNC_MODE=#{syncMode}, BATCH_SIZE=#{batchSize}, TASK_GROUP=#{taskGroup}, SCHEDULE_ID=#{scheduleId}, RUN_STATUS=#{runStatus}, LAST_RUN_TIME=#{lastRunTime}, NEXT_RUN_TIME=#{nextRunTime}, TOTAL_ROWS_SYNCED=#{totalRowsSynced}, NO_UPDATE=#{noUpdate}, STATUS=#{status}, REMARK=#{remark}, UPDATE_TIME=#{updateTime} WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE SYNC_TASK SET LAST_MARKER_VALUE=#{lastMarkerValue}, UPDATE_TIME=#{updateTime} WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE SYNC_TASK SET CHECKPOINT_DATA=#{checkpointData,jdbcType=CLOB}, UPDATE_TIME=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE SYNC_TASK SET CHECKPOINT_DATA = NULL, UPDATE_TIME = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
UPDATE SYNC_TASK SET RUN_STATUS=#{runStatus}, UPDATE_TIME=#{updateTime} WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE SYNC_TASK SET STATUS = 0, UPDATE_TIME = #{updateTime} WHERE ID = #{id}
